title: Attention Is All You Need
abstract: The paper introduces the Transformer architecture, replacing recurrence with attention mechanisms for sequence modeling.

title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
abstract: This paper proposes BERT, a bidirectional language representation model based on masked language modeling.

title: Generative AI for Customer Service
abstract: Generative AI can automate support, summarize tickets, and improve response personalization in service systems.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
abstract: RAG combines retrieval over external knowledge with generation to improve factual grounding.
